title: エンディング（ノーマル）

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three long years I've spent alongside Mejiro
Ardan, carving out a moment to remember, have
come to an end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She truly left a trail of light during the Twinkle
Series, an accomplishment that will be talked
about for generations to come.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But her story isn't over yet. No... She'll continue
to run, rivals at her side.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: HRAAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe! I see that the two of you have improved
further still.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! My timing was all wrong! But I won't be
making that mistake next time!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I could say the same. I missed the win this time,
but when next we meet, both of you will bear
witness to my victory.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: No, you're the one who's going to see me cross the finish line, Yaeno!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: No, I—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe!
choice_data_list:
There's nothing like a good rival to pump you
up.

There's nothing like a good rival to pump you
up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
That reminds me—we have a meeting scheduled
right now, don't we? I apologize.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh! You need to go, Ardan? Thanks for the race!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
This matter is not yet settled. We must race
again, and soon.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes, we can race as many times as you like... I
shall look forward to it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Now, if you'll excuse me.
Let's be off then, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
In this moment, Chiyono O, Yaeno, and I are all
able to push one another forward.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
This, too, was made possible thanks to all the
other moments we've been through, Trainer.
You've helped connect those two to my future.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Allow me once again... to express my deepest
gratitude.
choice_data_list: Well, I am your trainer, after all.
Well, I am your trainer, after all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
choice_data_list: Let's keep doing our best to envision the future.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Recently, I finally learned how to look forward to
things—to see beyond the present.
choice_data_list: What kind of future do you see?
What kind of future do you see?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I see Chiyono O, Yaeno, and I continuing to push
one another as we aim for greater heights...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: And next to me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I see you, as if nothing has changed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...That's the future I see.
